entry.name: tunnel.2
entry.comment: IPSec Tunnel to Azure US West 3 (Printer Services)

entry.name: tunnel.5

entry.name: tunnel.6
entry.comment: IPSec Tunnel to Azure US West 3 via TelecomISP2 (Printer Services)

snmp-system.location: 3200 E CHERRY CREEK SOUTH DR DENVER COLORADO 80209-3244 USA

entry.name: CORP_SCANNERS_SMTP
entry.description: Allows scanners to send SMTP out to Internet

value.member:
Notice

To access the network, you must first connect to GlobalProtect.

Captive Portal Detected

GlobalProtect has temporarily permitted network access for you to connect to the Internet. Follow instructions from your internet provider.

If you let the connection time out, open GlobalProtect and click Connect to try again.
You have attempted to access a protected resource that requires additional authentication. Proceed to authenticate at
Your security policy has restricted access to the network from this device. If the issue persists, contact your administrator.
Your security policy has restored access to the network from this device. If you still cannot access the network, contact your administrator.
